results.title: EU agrees to launch membership talks with Ukraine next week even as war with Russia drags on
results.description: The European Union has agreed to start membership talks with Ukraine next week after ambassadors decided that a conference to officially launch negotiations with Ukraine and Moldova will be held in Luxembourg on Monday.

results.title: Trump to participate in G7 working session with Zelensky
results.description: WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump will take part in a G7 working session with Ukraine's Volodymyr Zelensky in France on Tuesday, a senior administration official said.

results.title: Waukegan Steel Plans To Move To Pleasant Prairie
results.description: Near‐century‐old Waukegan Steel aims to lease 118,500 sq ft at 8500 116th St in Pleasant Prairie's LakeView Corporate Park, shifting manufacturing across I‐94.

results.title: Israeli settlers shoot, injure disabled Palestinian man in WB
results.description: The head of the Palestinian village of Duma confirmed that the man suffered from a mental disability and was held by Israeli forces after being shot.

results.title: Odisha Governor Haribabu Kambhampati reviews Puri Railway Station redevelopment work, watch
results.description: Puri: Odisha Governor Haribabu Kambhampati on Saturday reviewed the ongoing redevelopment work at Puri Railway Station. The Governor assessed the progress of the new terminal construction being undertaken by the Railways Department. With passenger footfall to Puri steadily rising, the station is being modernised to provide enhanced facilities for travellers. results.title: ‘Release Nnamdi Kanu Or Detain Sheikh Gumi’ — Primate Ayodele Tells Federal Gov’t
results.description: The Leader of INRI Evangelical Spiritual Church, Primate Elijah Ayodele, has questioned the continuous detention of the leader of the proscribed Indigenous People of Biafra (IPOB), Nnamdi Kanu, while Islamic cleric, Sheikh Ahmad Gumi, was free. Ayodele urged the Federal Government to release the detained leader of IPOB, arguing that fairness should guide the government’s [...]

results.title: Abrar Qazi Discusses New Show and Social Issues Ahead of Premiere
results.description: Abrar Qazi is gearing up for the launch of his new show 'Tu Hi Re Dil Mein' on Zee TV. In an exclusive interview, he addressed the recent Rs 370 biryani controversy involving comedian Pranit More, emphasizing the importance of respect for women. Abrar also shared his views on relationship red and green flags, advocating for equality and empathy. As excitement builds for his show, Abrar's powerful messages resonate with the youth, urging them to foster a culture of dignity and respect.

results.title: Peddler detained, another’s property attached in Kathua; cannabis destroyed in Doda
results.description: JAMMU: A drug peddler was booked under the PIT-NDPS Act, while a house and a goods carrier belonging to another were attached in Jammu and Kashmir’s Kathua district on Saturday, police said. Separately, police arrested two drug peddlers along with narcotics and cash in Kathua and Jammu districts and destroyed wild cannabis spread over five [...]
